summary: Successfully tested all Select component fixes and Logo component functionality. All Select dropdowns (City, Event Type, Venue Type, Setting, Rating on VenueSearchPage; Role/Status on AdminUsers; Stage on RMDashboard; Status/City on AdminVenues; Stage/City on AdminLeads) open without React errors. Logo displays correctly at appropriate sizes (header ~30px, large ~48px on login page) and is clickable, navigating to home from all pages.

issues: Minor HTML structure warnings about tr/span in tbody - hydration warnings, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Select components now correctly use value='__all__' instead of empty string for 'All' options - fix applied correctly
Logo component properly handles fallback to text-based logo with correct size variants
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Select component issues from iteration_1 have been fixed. The __all__ value pattern is working correctly across all filter dropdowns. Logo component displays properly using text-based fallback (no image asset at /public/assets/logo.png). All admin/RM dashboards are functioning correctly.

venue_search_page.city_filter: PASS - Opens dropdown, shows 4 city options including All Cities
venue_search_page.event_type_filter: PASS - Opens dropdown, shows 13 event type options
venue_search_page.setting_filter: PASS - Opens dropdown, shows Indoor/Outdoor options
venue_search_page.rating_filter: PASS - Opens dropdown, shows rating options
venue_search_page.filtering_works: PASS - Selecting Delhi shows 2 venues, adding Wedding filter shows correct filtered results

admin_users_page.role_filter: PASS - Opens dropdown, shows 6 role options

admin_venues_page.city_filter: PASS - Opens dropdown, shows 4 city options

admin_leads_page.stage_filter: PASS - Opens dropdown, shows 8 stage options
admin_leads_page.city_filter: PASS - Opens dropdown, shows 4 city options

rm_dashboard.stage_filter: PASS - Opens dropdown, shows 8 stage options

logo_functionality.header_logo: PASS - Displays at ~30px height, clickable to home
logo_functionality.login_page_logo: PASS - Displays at ~48px height (large variant), clickable to home
logo_functionality.dashboard_logo: PASS - Displays at ~32px height, clickable to home from dashboard
